command: env PYTHONPATH=outputs/code python outputs/code/scripts/write_gold_comparator_summary.py --baseline-dir outputs/results/er-stress-cross-platform/baselines --gold data/studies/gold/er_stress_upr_gold_panel_full.csv --gold-gene-column gene_symbol --degora-score-csv outputs/results/er-stress-cross-platform/degora_gene_scores.csv --degora-score-label v1_2_source_unit_mean --title 'ER stress FULL-EXPANDED supplementary panel recall' --output-csv outputs/results/er-stress-cross-platform/er_stress_full_panel_recall.csv --output-md outputs/results/er-stress-cross-platform/er_stress_full_panel_recall.md
